subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Preserve me, through Thy sovereignty and power, amidst Thy righteous servants. O Lord! Make me as Thou lovest and dost approve [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب فاحفظنی بسلطنتک و اقتدارک مع عبادک الأخیار ای رب فاجعلنی علی ما انت تحب و ترض
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action
